commits.message: chore: mark May 1 batch items as visible (IDs 6-11)
commits.author: Claude

panels.title: Mark May 1 batch items as visible
panels.scene: Villagers staring in awe at six newly visible, simple wooden crates labeled 'ID 6', 'ID 7', 'ID 8', 'ID 9', 'ID 10', and 'ID 11'. Knight stands beside them, looking bored.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The hidden crates... they are revealed!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Just flipped the 'visible' flag on six database entries.

panels.title: Mark May 1 batch items as visible
panels.scene: A villager is on his knees, weeping, while pointing at crate 'ID 9'. Behind him, others are also crying and dramatically pointing. Knight is checking his nails, looking disinterested.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: I can SEE crate NINE! I thought it was lost forever!

panels.title: Mark May 1 batch items as visible
panels.scene: Two villagers are arguing passionately about which crate is the most beautiful. One points to 'ID 6', the other points to 'ID 11'. Knight stands nearby, sketching in a notepad.

bubbles.speaker: Villager 1
bubbles.text: ID Six is the most aesthetically pleasing crate I've ever laid eyes on!

bubbles.speaker: Villager 2
bubbles.text: You dare insult ID Eleven? It's a paragon of crate design!

panels.title: One Commit: Six Crates Visible. Souls Healed.
panels.scene: Knight is sitting on a pile of wooden crates, looking weary. In the background, villagers are erecting a small monument made of stacked crates. One villager is carving 'visible = true' into one of the crates.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We shall celebrate this day forever!
